issues.description: FlipLife is correct for 'add 1 card from top of Life cards to hand', but the DSL structure has two separate effects (OnPlay and Trigger) when the card text describes a single sequential action. The second effect with trigger 'Trigger' is undefined and should not exist.
Duplicate/extraneous effect with trigger 'Trigger' (undefined trigger type). Card text describes one main effect on play, not two separate triggers.
